W

w(String, String) - Static method in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.utils.LogUtils
Writes warn logs.
w(String, String, Throwable) - Static method in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.utils.LogUtils
Writes warn logs.
WIFI_INSTALL_CREDENTIALS_DISPLAY - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings
Whether or not to display credentials in WIFI advanced settings: `Settings -> Wireless & networks -> WLAN -> Click menu on right top -> Advanced -> Install certificates` 0: Display 1: Not display
write(byte[], int, int) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.uart3.UART3Port
Deprecated.
Writes data after the port is opened.
write(byte[], int, int) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.analogserial.AnalogSerialManager
Deprecated.
Write data to serial port, this shall be called after calling AnalogSerialManager.open().
write(byte[], int) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.serialportmanager.SerialPort
Write data into serial port within timeout.
WRITE_ERROR - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.ErrorCode
[-12] Failed to write into file.
writeBlockData(byte, byte[]) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.external.contactless.ExtM1Card
Writes data to the specified block of M1 card after the block is authenticated.
writeBlockData(byte, byte[]) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M0Card
Deprecated.
Replaced by "MifareUltraLightCard.write()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
writeBlockData(byte, byte[]) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.plugin.card.api.internal.contactless.M1Card
Deprecated.
Replaced by "MifareClassicCard.writeBlockData()" in Newland NSDK RFIC library.
writeData(EmulateFileType, byte[]) - Method in interface com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.cardemulator.ExtCardEmulator
Writes data into the target emulated card file.
